title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast discusses how software engineering roles are changing with AI adoption, the trend of "tokenmaxxing" as companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip for on-device models, and challenges universities face integrating AI literacy into curricula as students enter transformed workplaces.
